meaning: n.[气]沙暴,沙漠地带的暴风沙
examples: The men lost their way in a sandstorm.
His plane made a crash-landing during a sandstorm yesterday.
The men lost their way in a sandstorm and crossed the border by mistake.
The U.S. military said the planned security handover ceremony was postponed because of a sandstorm.
In 2003, I struck out on my own and founded Sandstorm Media, a copywriting and content marketing company.
